---

Retargeting Campaigns Using DPA
A basic expectation of any Ecom store with some form of
product variation is to run DPA (Dynamic Product Ads) for
their Ecom store. Includes insights on how to setup your
retargeting campaign to get the best performance.
VIDEO 1
Combining WC and PC for Retargeting Ads (HOT)
A hack which combines Website Conversion ads (static,
video, carousel etc) with Product Catalog ads (based on
DPAs) to maximise retargeting ROAS.
VIDEO 2
Tip: you can also use the Traffic and Impressions based optimisation to reach more of your
smaller audiences.
For example I only advocate the Traffic objective if you know your audience well enough to
get as many clicks as you can (eg. an existing customer list, or those that have added to cart
not purchased).
Your retargeting strategy will depend on the size of spend/audience size in your retargeting
list.
The larger your retargeting pool the more you can experiment with offers and customer
journeys.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
